summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ProfitPilot financial management platform. Backend APIs are functioning well (95.8% success rate) with successful CRUD operations for transactions, invoices, and clients. However, critical frontend JavaScript errors are preventing navigation and proper data display.

minor_issues.issue: Allows duplicate user registration with same email
minor_issues.impact: Should return 400 error for duplicate emails but returns 201

ui_bugs.issue: KPI stats cards show $0.00 instead of real data from backend
Client-side JavaScript errors prevent navigation to other pages after login

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard not fetching/displaying transaction stats from backend API
Application error occurs when navigating between pages, showing 'client-side exception has occurred'

passed_tests: Login page loads and displays correctly
Transaction stats API returns correct data
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix client-side JavaScript errors preventing navigation between pages. The application shows 'client-side exception has occurred' error when trying to navigate from dashboard to other pages. Also fix frontend-backend integration so dashboard displays real transaction data instead of $0.00.
